name: Ovo/Lacto - Chili Cheese Cubes
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces Cans of Chopped Green Chilis
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs for 4 to 5 minutes until light.
2. Add flour, baking powder, and salt. Mix well.
3. Fold in cheese and chilis.
4. Pour mixture into a greased 9x13x2 inch baking pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
6. Cut into 2-inch squares. Serve hot or cold.
